mapper.select: select offer.*, company.company_name as company_name, seeker.username as job_seeker_name, recruiter.username as recruiter_name, position.title as job_title from t_offer_record offer left join t_company company on offer.company_id = company.company_id left join t_user seeker on offer.job_seeker_id = seeker.user_id left join t_user recruiter on offer.recruiter_id = recruiter.user_id left join t_job_position position on offer.job_position_id = position.id where offer.is_deleted = 0 and offer.id = #{id}
select count(1) from t_offer_record where is_deleted = 0 and job_application_id = #{jobApplicationId} and status = 0
